keyPoints: Arguments are passed through argc and argv

questions.question: What are header files used for in C++?

keyPoints: System header files vs user-defined header files

keyPoints: Preventing multiple inclusions of a header file

keyPoints: Bringinging the standard library namespace into scope

keyPoints: Header files as containers of declarations
Importance of header files in code organization and reuse

Arguments passed through argc and argv
